title: FLINT&STEEL...
description: Replaces the igniting sound of flint & steel with Steve's qoute from A Minecraft Movie
body:
This silly pack changes the igniting sound to the "FLINT AND STEEL..." meme which is (if you didn't know) one of Steve's qoutes from A Minecraft Movie.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9t_LiysSmC4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
